notes: Raised at the first South African port of call and remains valid until the vessel departs from the last South African port of call
Valid for 60 days in South African waters
After 60 days, vessel is deemed coastal and liable for monthly light dues
Vessels remaining within a specific port for extended periods are charged only once
Coasters are subject to special agreements and monthly billing

surcharges.description: Vessels in port for longer than 30 days not engaged in cargo working or undergoing repairs (on the incremental fee of port dues)

Vessels not engaged in cargo working for the first 30 days only; Bona fide coasters; Passenger vessels; Small vessels resorting under Section 4, Clause 4.2 when visiting a port other than their registered port
Vessels calling for the sole purpose of taking on bunkers and/or stores and/or water or a combination of all three, provided the vessel’s entire stay does not exceed 48 hours
